name: Security Gate — srg-vulnerable-app
description: Bloqueia deploys quando o AppSec detecta CVEs críticos ou altos no srg-vulnerable-app.

objectives.name: Sem vulnerabilidades CRITICAL
objectives.dqlQuery: fetch security.events | dedup {vulnerability.display_id, affected_entity.id} | filter vulnerability.resolution.status=="OPEN" AND vulnerability.parent.mute.status!="MUTED" AND vulnerability.mute.status!="MUTED" AND vulnerability.risk.level=="CRITICAL" | summarize {'Critical open vulnerabilities'=countDistinct(vulnerability.display_id)}

objectives.name: Vulnerabilidades HIGH menores que 3
objectives.dqlQuery: fetch security.events | dedup {vulnerability.display_id, affected_entity.id} | filter vulnerability.resolution.status=="OPEN" AND vulnerability.parent.mute.status!="MUTED" AND vulnerability.mute.status!="MUTED" AND vulnerability.risk.level=="HIGH" | summarize {'High open vulnerabilities'=countDistinct(vulnerability.display_id)}
